sigWerErrors.reason: 'bản' (copy/document) and 'cái' (thing) are different words; this changes the meaning of the request and makes it unclear what is being asked for.
'đơn' (bill/document) and 'đất' (land/soil) are unrelated; this substitution makes the sentence incoherent.
'nhất' (most/newest) and 'ít' (least/few) are opposite in meaning and change the intent of the request.
'thẻ' (card) and 'thế' (how/so) are different words; this substitution makes the phrase about 'credit card' incorrect.
